questions.question: Candle making ke liye sabse basic aur common ingredient kya hai?

options.B: Water

questions.explanation: Candle making ka core ingredient wax hota hai, jo jal kar roshni deta hai.

questions.question: Candle ko jalane ke liye kis cheez ka use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Wick

questions.explanation: Wick (batti) candle ka woh hissa hai jo jal kar wax ko fuel deta hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein safety ke liye kya important hai?

options.B: Ventilated area mein kaam karna
options.C: Wax ko hamesha high flame par melt karna

questions.explanation: Ventilated area mein kaam karna fumes aur overheating se bachne ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Candle making process mein wax ko kis method se melt kiya jata hai?

options.B: Microwave mein

questions.explanation: Double boiler method wax ko evenly aur safely melt karta hai, overheating se bachata hai.

questions.question: Candle making ke liye temperature control kyun important hai?

options.B: Fragrance aur color properly mix ho

questions.explanation: Sahi temperature control wax ki quality, fragrance throw aur candle ki appearance ko affect karta hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein kaunsa tool wax ko melt karne ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Pouring pot

questions.explanation: Pouring pot mein wax ko melt karke molds ya containers mein daala jata hai.

questions.question: Candle ki fragrance ko kya kehte hain jo jalne par release hoti hai?

options.B: Scent hold

questions.explanation: Scent throw woh ability hai jisse candle ki fragrance hawa mein spread hoti hai.

questions.question: Candle mein color add karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Fabric dye

questions.explanation: Candle dye specifically wax ke saath mix hone aur jalne ke liye design kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Candle ko kaunse temperature par pour karna chahiye?

options.B: As soon as it melts

questions.explanation: Har wax type ka ek ideal pouring temperature hota hai jo smooth finish aur proper adherence ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Candle mein wick ka kya role hai?

options.B: Wax ko fuel tak pahunchana

questions.explanation: Wick capillary action se molten wax ko flame tak absorb karke fuel provide karta hai.

questions.question: Candle ko containers mein banate samay wick ko center mein rakhne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Wick clip

questions.explanation: Pencil ya chopstick ko container ke upar rakh kar wick ko center mein hold kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Candle banate samay wax ke bubbles ko remove karne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Wax ko zor se stir karna
options.B: Slowly pour karna

questions.explanation: Dheere-dheere pour karne se air bubbles minimize hote hain.

questions.question: Candle making mein wax ko melt karne ke liye kaunsa utensil safe hai?

options.B: Glass jar

questions.explanation: Metal pouring pot heat ko withstand kar sakta hai aur pouring ke liye convenient hota hai.

questions.question: Candle ko smooth finish dene ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Even cooling

questions.explanation: Even cooling se candle ki surface smooth aur crack-free banti hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein 'curing time' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Wax ko melt karne ka time
options.B: Candle ko thanda hone ka time
options.C: Fragrance ko wax mein set hone ka time
options.D: Wick ko trim karne ka time

questions.explanation: Curing time woh period hai jismein fragrance oil wax ke saath properly bond hota hai, jisse scent throw improve hota hai.

questions.question: Sabse common aur inexpensive candle wax kaunsa hai?

options.B: Beeswax

questions.explanation: Paraffin wax candle making mein sabse zyada use hone wala aur sasta wax hai.

questions.question: Kis wax ko 'natural wax' category mein rakha jata hai aur jo renewable resource se banta hai?

options.B: Gel wax

questions.explanation: Soy wax soybeans se banta hai aur ek natural, biodegradable option hai.

questions.question: Beeswax kahan se aata hai?

options.B: Plants se

questions.explanation: Beeswax honeybees dwara banaya jata hai aur ek natural, pure wax hai.

questions.question: Gel candles banane ke liye kaunsa wax use hota hai?

options.B: Soy wax

questions.explanation: Gel wax ek transparent, rubbery material hai jo mineral oil aur polymer se banta hai.

questions.question: Wick ko candle mein kya function perform karna hota hai?

options.A: To absorb molten wax and deliver it to the flame
options.B: To add color to the candle
options.D: To give off a pleasant smell

questions.explanation: Wick capillary action ke through molten wax ko flame tak pahunchata hai, jisse candle jalti hai.

questions.question: Agar wick bahut mota ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Flame bahut choti hogi
options.D: Flame bahut badi hogi aur soot produce karegi

questions.explanation: Mota wick zyada fuel absorb karta hai, jisse badi flame aur soot (kaalik) ban sakti hai.

questions.question: Agar wick bahut patla ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Candle bahut fast jalegi
options.C: Flame chhoti hogi aur candle tunnel karegi

questions.explanation: Patla wick kam fuel deliver karta hai, jisse chhoti flame aur 'tunneling' ho sakti hai (wax side mein chipka reh jayega).

questions.question: Wick ko trim karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Soot aur excessive flame se bachne ke liye
options.C: Candle ko achha dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Trimmed wick clean burn aur proper flame height maintain karta hai, soot formation ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Wick ko kitna trim karna ideal mana jata hai?

options.B: 1/4 inch (approx 6mm)

questions.explanation: 1/4 inch wick length ideal hoti hai clean aur steady flame ke liye.

questions.question: Wick 'priming' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Wick ko wax mein dip karna

questions.explanation: Priming mein wick ko wax mein dip karke usse stiff aur burn-ready banaya jata hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa wax ek 'slow burning' wax hai aur uski burn time zyada hoti hai?

options.B: Gel wax

questions.explanation: Beeswax naturally slow burn karta hai aur uski burn time dusre waxes se zyada hoti hai.

questions.question: Adhesive wick tabs ka kya use hai?

options.A: Wick ko container ke bottom se chipkane ke liye
options.B: Wick ko top se hold karne ke liye
options.C: Wick ko color karne ke liye
options.D: Wick ko fragrance dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Adhesive wick tabs wick ko container ke base par securely hold karne mein help karte hain.

questions.question: Wax additives jaise 'Stearic Acid' ka kya use hai?

options.B: Wax ko soft banana
options.C: Wax ko hard karna aur burn time badhana

questions.explanation: Stearic acid wax ko hard karta hai, burn time badhata hai aur opaque finish deta hai.

questions.question: Candle ke liye 'UV inhibitor' kyun use kiya jata hai?

options.A: Candle ko jaldi jalane ke liye
options.B: Candle ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.C: Candle ko sunlight se color fade hone se bachane ke liye
options.D: Candle ko zyada fragrance dene ke liye

questions.explanation: UV inhibitor sunlight ke exposure se candle ke color ko fade hone se rokta hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa wax 'frosting' ke liye prone hota hai (white patches on surface)?

options.B: Soy wax

questions.explanation: Soy wax apni natural crystalline structure ke karan frosting dikha sakta hai.

questions.question: Wooden wicks ki kya khaasiyat hai?

options.B: Ye ek soft crackling sound produce karte hain
options.D: Ye zyada soot produce karte hain

questions.explanation: Wooden wicks jalne par ek gentle, crackling sound dete hain, jo fireplace jaisa feel deta hai.

questions.question: Wick ko wax mein dip karne se pehle use straight rakhne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.B: Use tape se chipkana
options.C: Use wick bar ya clothespin se hold karna

questions.explanation: Wick bars ya clothespins wick ko center aur straight rakhne mein madad karte hain jab wax set hota hai.

questions.question: Wax ka 'melt pool' kya hota hai?

options.A: Woh area jahan wax solid rehta hai
options.B: Woh area jahan wax jal kar khatam hota hai
options.C: Molten wax ka pool jo flame ke around banta hai
options.D: Wax jo container ke side mein chipka rehta hai

questions.explanation: Melt pool woh molten wax ka layer hota hai jo candle jalne par wick ke around banta hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa wax skin-safe hota hai aur massage candles ke liye use hota hai?

options.B: Soy wax aur Shea Butter blend

questions.explanation: Soy wax aur shea butter jaise natural waxes skin-safe hote hain aur massage candles ke liye ideal hain.

questions.question: Wick ki thickness kis par depend karti hai?

options.B: Container ke diameter aur wax type par

questions.explanation: Sahi wick size container ke diameter aur use kiye gaye wax type par depend karta hai, taki proper melt pool bane.

questions.question: Candle mein fragrance add karne ke liye sabse common form kya hai?

options.B: Fragrance oils (FOs)

questions.explanation: Fragrance oils (FOs) concentrated form mein hote hain aur candle making mein widely use hote hain.

questions.question: Essential oils (EOs) aur fragrance oils (FOs) mein kya difference hai?

options.A: EOs synthetic hote hain, FOs natural
options.B: EOs natural hote hain, FOs synthetic ya blend
options.D: EOs sirf food mein use hote hain

questions.explanation: Essential oils plants se extract kiye jate hain (natural), jabki fragrance oils synthetic compounds ya natural extracts ka blend hote hain.

questions.question: Candle mein fragrance kab add karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab wax boiling hot ho
options.C: Jab wax ek specific temperature par ho (cool down hone ke baad)

questions.explanation: Fragrance ko 'flash point' se neeche add karna chahiye, jab wax cool down ho jaye, taki fragrance evaporate na ho.

questions.question: Fragrance oil ki quantity ko kya kehte hain jo wax mein add ki jati hai?

options.B: Fragrance load

questions.explanation: Fragrance load wax ke total weight ka percentage hota hai jo fragrance oil ka hota hai.

questions.question: Candle mein bahut zyada fragrance oil add karne se kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Candle theek se nahi jalegi ya soot karegi
options.D: Candle ka burn time badh jayega

questions.explanation: Excessive fragrance oil wax ki structure ko disturb kar sakta hai, jisse poor burn performance aur soot ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Candle mein color add karne ke liye kaunse products use kiye ja sakte hain?

options.B: Liquid dyes aur dye blocks

questions.explanation: Liquid dyes aur dye blocks specifically wax ke liye banaye jate hain aur achhe results dete hain.

questions.question: Candle dye ko wax mein kab add karna chahiye?

options.B: Wax melt hote hi
options.C: Wax ke puri tarah melt hone ke baad aur fragrance se pehle

questions.explanation: Dye ko wax ke puri tarah melt hone ke baad add karna chahiye taki woh evenly mix ho sake.

questions.question: Agar candle ka color uneven ho, toh iska kya karan ho sakta hai?

options.A: Fragrance oil achhe se mix nahi hua
options.B: Wax ko theek se stir nahi kiya gaya

questions.explanation: Uneven color mixing tab hota hai jab dye wax mein properly distribute nahi hota, isliye achhe se stir karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Mica powder ko candle mein color aur shimmer ke liye use karne par kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Isko sirf top layer par use karna chahiye
options.B: Isko bahut zyada use nahi karna chahiye kyunki yeh wick ko clog kar sakta hai
options.C: Isko sirf clear waxes mein use karna chahiye
options.D: Isko sirf molds mein use karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Mica powder heavy hota hai aur wick ko clog kar sakta hai, jisse burn performance affect hoti hai. Isliye moderation mein ya surface decoration ke liye use karein.

questions.question: Candle mein 'hot throw' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fragrance jo candle ke jalne par release hoti hai
options.B: Fragrance jo candle ke thanda hone par release hoti hai
options.C: Fragrance jo candle ke solid state mein hoti hai
options.D: Fragrance jo wax mein mix nahi hoti

questions.explanation: Hot throw woh fragrance hai jo candle ke jalne par atmosphere mein release hoti hai.

questions.question: Candle mein 'cold throw' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Fragrance jo candle ke jalne par release hoti hai
options.B: Fragrance jo solid candle se release hoti hai (bina jale)
options.C: Fragrance jo jaldi khatam ho jati hai
options.D: Fragrance jo bahut kam hoti hai

questions.explanation: Cold throw woh fragrance hai jo unlit candle se emanate hoti hai.

questions.question: Fragrance oils ko store karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Cool, dark place mein store karna

questions.explanation: Fragrance oils ko cool, dark place mein store karne se unki shelf life aur potency bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Color fading se bachne ke liye kya kiya ja sakta hai?

options.B: Candle ko direct sunlight se door rakhna

questions.explanation: Sunlight UV rays ke karan candle ke color ko fade kar sakti hai, isliye unhe shade mein rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Candle making mein color mixing ke liye kaunsi basic primary colors hain?

options.B: Red, Yellow, Blue

questions.explanation: Red, Yellow, Blue (RYB) traditional primary colors hain jinse dusre colors mix kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Agar aapko pastel shade ka color chahiye, toh aap kya karenge?

options.B: Bahut kam dye add karenge

questions.explanation: Pastel shades banane ke liye bahut kam quantity mein dye add kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Pillar candles banane ke liye kis tarah ke molds use hote hain?

options.B: Silicone molds

questions.explanation: Silicone molds flexible hote hain aur set hone ke baad candle ko easily demold karne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Container candles banane ke liye kya use kiya jata hai?

options.B: Rubber molds
options.C: Glass jars, tins ya ceramic pots

questions.explanation: Container candles woh hoti hain jo apne container mein hi jalti hain, jaise ki glass jars ya tins mein.

questions.question: Molds ko use karne se pehle unhe prepare karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki wax chipak na jaaye aur demolding easy ho
options.B: Taki candle ka color achha aaye
options.D: Taki fragrance achhe se mix ho

questions.explanation: Molds ko mold release spray ya conditioner se prepare karne se wax chipakta nahi aur candle smoothly demold ho jati hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa mold material heat-resistant aur reusable hota hai?

options.B: Plastic

questions.explanation: Metal molds durable, heat-resistant hote hain aur kai baar use kiye ja sakte hain.

questions.question: Container candles mein wick ko bottom par secure karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Wick sticker/adhesive

questions.explanation: Wick stickers wick tab ko container ke base par securely attach karte hain.

questions.question: Molds mein wick ko center mein kaise rakha jata hai?

options.B: Wick clip ya wick bar ka use karke

questions.explanation: Wick clips ya wick bars mold ke top par rakh kar wick ko center aur straight rakhte hain.

questions.question: Agar mold mein wax leak ho raha ho, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Wax ko jaldi se pour karna
options.B: Mold ko achhe se seal karna aur check karna

questions.explanation: Leakage se bachne ke liye mold ke seams ko achhe se seal karna aur kisi bhi crack ko check karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Kaunsa container type 'wet spots' (wax ka container se detach hona) dikha sakta hai?

options.B: Glass containers

questions.explanation: Glass containers mein temperature differences ke karan wax contraction aur expansion se wet spots dikh sakte hain.

questions.question: Wet spots ko minimize karne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Wax ko bahut garam pour karna
options.B: Wax ko cool down karke pour karna aur evenly cool karna

questions.explanation: Wax ko sahi temperature par pour karna aur candle ko evenly cool hone dena wet spots ko kam kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Molds aur containers ko wax residue se saaf karne ka sabse achha tarika kya hai?

options.A: Garam pani aur sabun se dhona
options.B: Freezer mein rakh kar wax ko pop out karna

questions.explanation: Freezing se wax shrink hota hai aur easily pop out ho jata hai, jisse cleaning easy ho jati hai.

questions.question: Pillar candles mein bottom hole ko seal karne ke liye kya use karte hain?

options.B: Putty ya mold sealer

questions.explanation: Putty ya mold sealer wick ke bottom hole ko seal karta hai taki wax leak na ho.

questions.question: Agar container candle ki surface uneven ho ya sinkhole ban jaye, toh kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Wax ko re-pour karna ya heat gun se smooth karna

questions.explanation: Re-pour ya heat gun ka use karke surface ko smooth kiya ja sakta hai aur sinkholes ko fill kiya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Molds ko store karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Clean aur dry jagah par store karna
options.C: Ek dusre ke upar stack karna

questions.explanation: Molds ko clean aur dry jagah par store karne se unki life badhti hai aur damage se bachte hain.

questions.question: Kaunsa container transparent hota hai aur gel candles ke liye ideal hai?

options.B: Tin

questions.explanation: Glass containers gel candles ke transparent nature ko display karne ke liye perfect hote hain.

questions.question: Molds ya containers ko pre-heat karna kyun beneficial ho sakta hai?

options.A: Wax ko jaldi thanda karne ke liye
options.B: Wax aur container ke beech 'wet spots' ko kam karne ke liye
options.D: Color ko zyada vibrant banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Molds/containers ko thoda pre-heat karne se wax evenly cool hota hai aur wet spots kam hote hain.

questions.question: Wax ko melt karte samay temperature ko monitor karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Overheating se bachne aur additives ko properly mix karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi temperature control overheating ko rokta hai aur ensure karta hai ki fragrance aur color jaise additives effectively mix ho.

questions.question: Candle making mein 'flash point' kya hota hai?

options.A: Woh temperature jis par wax melt hota hai
options.B: Woh temperature jis par fragrance oil evaporate hona shuru karta hai
options.C: Woh temperature jis par wick jalta hai
options.D: Woh temperature jis par candle set hoti hai

questions.explanation: Flash point woh lowest temperature hai jis par fragrance oil ki vapors air mein ignite ho sakti hain. Isliye fragrance ko flash point se neeche add karna chahiye.

questions.question: Wax ko containers mein pour karte samay kya precautions leni chahiye?

options.B: Dheere aur steady stream mein pour karna
options.C: Wax ko ubaal kar pour karna
options.D: Wick ko touch karte hue pour karna

questions.explanation: Dheere pour karne se air bubbles minimize hote hain aur smooth surface banti hai.

questions.question: Agar candle ki surface par sinkhole ban jaye, toh usse theek karne ke liye kya kar sakte hain?

options.A: Upar se thoda aur garam wax daalna (re-pour)
options.B: Thanda pani daalna

questions.explanation: Sinkholes ko fill karne ke liye thoda aur garam wax top par re-pour kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Candle ko thanda karte samay usse kahan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Freezer mein
options.C: Room temperature par, draft-free area mein

questions.explanation: Room temperature par, draft-free area mein evenly cool hone se candle ki surface smooth aur crack-free banti hai.

questions.question: 'Tunneling' kya hota hai candle mein?

options.A: Jab candle bahut fast jalti hai
options.B: Jab wick ke around hi wax melt hota hai aur sides mein wax chipka reh jata hai
options.C: Jab flame bahut chhoti hoti hai
options.D: Jab candle ka color fade ho jata hai

questions.explanation: Tunneling tab hota hai jab wick bahut patla ho ya candle ko lambe samay tak na jalaya gaya ho, jisse sides ka wax waste ho jata hai.

questions.question: Tunneling se bachne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sahi size ka wick use karna aur har bar candle ko poore melt pool tak jalana
options.B: Wick ko lamba rakhna

questions.explanation: Sahi wick size aur poore melt pool tak jalana tunneling ko rokta hai.

questions.question: Candle ko jalane se pehle wick ko trim karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki flame stable rahe aur soot kam ho
options.B: Taki candle jaldi khatam ho

questions.explanation: Trimmed wick clean burn, stable flame aur kam soot formation ensure karta hai.

questions.question: Agar candle jalne par bahut zyada soot produce kar rahi ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Wick bahut lamba ya mota hai

questions.explanation: Lamba ya mota wick zyada fuel absorb karta hai, jisse badi flame aur soot banti hai.

questions.question: Candle ki surface par 'frosting' (white patches) ko kaise minimize kiya ja sakta hai?

options.A: Wax ko bahut garam pour karna
options.B: Wax ko thoda kam temperature par pour karna aur slow cool karna

questions.explanation: Thoda kam temperature par pour karna aur slow, even cooling frosting ko kam kar sakti hai, especially soy wax mein.

questions.question: Candle 'curing' ke liye kitna time ideal mana jata hai?

options.B: 1-2 din

questions.explanation: 1-2 hafte ka curing time fragrance ko wax ke saath properly bond hone deta hai, jisse hot throw improve hota hai.

questions.question: Agar candle mein 'wet spots' dikh rahe hain, toh iska kya matlab hai?

options.A: Wax container se chipka hua nahi hai
options.B: Wax bahut zyada garam hai

questions.explanation: Wet spots tab hote hain jab wax container ki walls se detach ho jata hai, usually temperature fluctuations ke karan.

questions.question: Candle ko 're-pour' karne ki zaroorat kab padti hai?

options.A: Jab candle ki surface uneven ho ya sinkholes hon
options.B: Jab wick bahut chhota ho
options.D: Jab candle ka color bahut dark ho

questions.explanation: Re-pour uneven surface aur sinkholes ko theek karne ke liye kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Candle ko demold karne se pehle kitna time wait karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab tak candle puri tarah se thandi aur hard na ho jaye

questions.explanation: Candle ko puri tarah se thanda aur hard hone dena demolding ko easy banata hai aur damage se bachata hai.

questions.question: Wax ko double boiler method mein melt karte samay pani ko kitna garam karna chahiye?

options.B: Simmering (dheemi aanch par)

questions.explanation: Simmering water wax ko evenly aur control tarike se melt karta hai, overheating se bachata hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki candle ki flame bahut choti hai, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Wick bahut patla ya chhota hai

questions.explanation: Patla ya chhota wick enough fuel deliver nahi kar pata, jisse flame choti rehti hai.

questions.question: Candle ko smooth top finish dene ke liye kya helpful hai?

options.A: Wax ko bahut fast cool karna
options.B: Wax ko slow aur evenly cool karna
options.D: Candle ko sidha sunlight mein rakhna

questions.explanation: Slow aur evenly cooling se surface smooth aur crack-free banti hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein 'potpourri effect' kya hota hai?

options.A: Jab candle bahut zyada fragrance deti hai
options.B: Jab fragrance oil wax mein theek se mix nahi hota aur bottom mein settle ho jata hai
options.C: Jab candle ka color bahut vibrant ho
options.D: Jab candle bahut dheere jalti hai

questions.explanation: Potpourri effect tab hota hai jab fragrance oil wax mein theek se dissolve ya suspend nahi hota aur bottom mein settle ho jata hai, jisse burn performance affect hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapki candle jalne par unevenly burn ho rahi hai, toh kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Wick centering aur wax ka type

questions.explanation: Improper wick centering aur galat wax type uneven burn ka karan ban sakte hain.

questions.question: Candle ki surface par 'bloom' kya hota hai?

options.B: Jab candle par white powdery film ban jati hai
options.C: Jab candle bahut tez jalti hai

questions.explanation: Bloom (ya frosting) ek natural phenomenon hai jismein wax ke crystals surface par white powdery film bana dete hain, especially soy wax mein.

questions.question: Candle making karte samay fire safety ke liye kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Open flame ke paas kaam karna
options.C: Flammable materials ko wax ke paas rakhna

questions.explanation: Fire extinguisher ya water bucket emergency ke liye hamesha ready rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) mein candle making ke liye kya shamil hai?

options.B: Helmet aur knee pads

questions.explanation: Gloves garam wax se bachane ke liye aur safety glasses aankhon ko splash se bachane ke liye zaroori hain.

questions.question: Finished candle par label lagana kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Product ki information aur safety warnings dene ke liye
options.C: Candle ko mehnga dikhane ke liye
options.D: Candle ko jaldi jalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Labeling mein product ingredients, burn instructions, aur safety warnings honi chahiye, jo legal requirement bhi ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Candle packaging mein kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Candle ko damage se bachana aur brand identity banana

questions.explanation: Packaging candle ko transport aur storage ke dauran protect karti hai aur brand ki pehchan banati hai.

questions.question: Candle business shuru karne ke liye sabse pehla step kya hai?

options.B: Research karna aur business plan banana
options.C: Bahut sare candles bana kar stock karna

questions.explanation: Market research aur ek solid business plan banana successful business ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Candle ki cost calculate karte samay kya factors consider karne chahiye?

options.A: Sirf wax aur wick ki cost
options.B: Raw material, packaging, labor aur overhead costs

questions.explanation: Sahi pricing ke liye sabhi direct aur indirect costs ko consider karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Candle ko online sell karne ke liye kaunsa platform use kar sakte hain?

options.B: E-commerce websites jaise Etsy, Amazon ya apni website

questions.explanation: E-commerce platforms aur apni website online sales ke liye effective channels hain.

questions.question: Candle ke liye brand name choose karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unique, memorable aur product se relevant naam
options.C: Kisi bhi popular brand ka naam copy karna

questions.explanation: Ek achha brand name unique, memorable aur product ki identity ko reflect karta hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein 'batch testing' kyun important hai?

options.B: Product ki quality aur consistency ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf naye fragrances test karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Batch testing har lot ki candles ki quality, burn performance aur fragrance throw ko check karta hai.

questions.question: Candle storage ke liye kya ideal conditions hain?

options.B: Garam aur humid environment

questions.explanation: Cool, dry aur dark place candles ko color fading, melting aur fragrance loss se bachati hai.

questions.question: Candle ki shelf life kitni hoti hai?

options.B: 1-2 mahine

questions.explanation: Properly stored candles 1-2 saal tak apni quality maintain kar sakti hain, lekin fragrance time ke saath fade ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Candle business mein 'unique selling proposition (USP)' kya hota hai?

options.B: Woh khaas cheez jo aapke product ko competitors se alag banati hai
options.C: Sirf ek type ki candle banana

questions.explanation: USP woh factor hai jo aapke product ko market mein stand out karta hai, jaise unique fragrance, eco-friendly wax, ya special packaging.

questions.question: Customers se feedback lena kyun important hai?

options.A: Taki unhe khush kiya ja sake
options.B: Product aur service ko improve karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf reviews collect karne ke liye
options.D: Naye products introduce karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Customer feedback product shortcomings ko highlight karta hai aur improvement areas batata hai.

questions.question: Candle business mein legal compliance ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Product labeling, safety standards aur business registration jaise laws ko follow karna
options.C: Koi bhi law follow na karna

questions.explanation: Legal compliance mein product specific regulations, safety standards aur general business laws ko follow karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Candle making mein waste ko kaise manage karna chahiye?

options.A: Sab kuch dustbin mein phenk dena
options.B: Wax scraps ko reuse karna aur packaging ko recycle karna
options.C: Chemical waste ko pani mein bahana

questions.explanation: Wax scraps ko melt karke reuse kiya ja sakta hai aur packaging materials ko recycle karna eco-friendly practice hai.
